recommendations.title: Peaceful Warrior
recommendations.overview: A chance encounter with a stranger changes the life of a college gymnast.

recommendations.title: Clownhouse
recommendations.overview: Three teenage brothers are terrorized by a trio of escaped mental patients disguised as clowns.

recommendations.title: Jeepers Creepers
recommendations.overview: On a desolate country highway, two homeward-bound teens are nearly run off the road by a maniac in a beat-up truck, and later spot him shoving what appears to be a body down a sewer pipe.

recommendations.title: Powder

recommendations.title: Rosewood Lane

recommendations.title: The Texas Chain Saw Massacre
recommendations.overview: Five friends head out to rural Texas to visit the grave of a grandfather. On the way, they stumble across what appears to be a deserted house, only to discover something sinister within. Something armed with a chainsaw.

recommendations.title: McFarland, USA
recommendations.overview: A track coach in a small California town transforms a team of athletes into championship contenders.

recommendations.title: Miraculous World: London, At the Edge of Time
recommendations.overview: To save the future from a terrible fate, Marinette becomes Chronobug and teams up with Bunnyx to defeat a mysterious opponent who travels through time.
